name: tide
description: HAR-driven, source-aware API test generation for pytest suites.

interface.shortDescription: Generate pytest API tests from HAR recordings
interface.longDescription: Tide turns browser HAR recordings into production-oriented pytest API suites. It can scan existing automation projects, reuse local conventions, analyze backend source when configured, and generate layered assertions with deterministic validation steps.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-tide to initialize this API automation project.
Use $tide to generate pytest API tests from this HAR file.
Use $tide with no-source mode to create tests from a HAR recording.
